name: Glory to the CCOR
shortDescription: Help the Politburo reconquer their lost territory, and establish the glorious CCOR as a sovereign power once again.
description: Help the Politburo reconquer their lost territory, and establish the glorious Confederated Councils of the Outer Rim as a sovereign power once again. Ferry in volunteer recruits, transport supply donations, and combat the wretched Pirates that have occupied the worlds of the CCOR.
